title: Time Lost and Time Remembered
writer: Jean Anouilh, Desmond Davis, Edna O'Brien
actors: Sarah Miles, Cyril Cusack, Julian Glover
plot: Cass followed the bright lights to London, but was quickly disillusioned. She met (and married) Doctor Langdon, and soon realised she wanted to return to her home by the sea, and her first love Colin.
